name: lakes_and_rivers
description: Mumbai polygon water bodies — lakes and river polygons exported from QGIS.
notes: Use ftype column to distinguish lakes from rivers and apply appropriate buffer sizes. Project to a metric CRS (e.g. EPSG:32643) before buffering. Some features may be MultiPolygon — use make_valid() before spatial operations.
example_code:
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid
lakes_rivers = gpd.read_file('/data/geojson_files/lakes_and_rivers.geojson')
lakes_rivers['geometry'] = lakes_rivers['geometry'].apply(make_valid)
print(lakes_rivers[['ftype', 'geometry']].head())
